title: Round Hat Boxes with Lids, 43 x 26cm Soft Felt Hat Storage Box Dark Grey Hats Organiser, Foldable Travel Hats Boxes Storage with Transparent Window and Handle Zip for Storing Clothes, Toys
features: 【High Quality Material】Our hat storage box is made of high quality felt material, which is soft and comfortable to touch and will not scratch or damage your hat. It can be used for a long time without easy damage.

【Extra Large Capacity】Felt hat storage box with lid has a large capacity, round design provides plenty of space to hold multiple hats, keep the shape of hats intact and avoid deformation, convenient for you to organise and store your hats.

【Transparent Window Design】Dark grey hat box with lid comes with a transparent window, making it easy for you to quickly view the hats in the box and choose the right one without opening the lid, convenient for you.

【Easy to Use】Felt travel hat box can be folded and stored, moderate size, light weight, with handle and zip, very easy to carry. Meanwhile, the surface is easy to clean, just wipe it with a damp cloth to keep it clean.

【Widely Used】This round hat storage box is not only perfect for hat storage, but also can store plush toys, clothes, gloves, scarves, baby products, towels, blankets, etc., become your daily life's right-hand man.
description: Set Contents 1 x Dark grey foldable storage box with lid Specification Size: 43×26cm/16.9×10.2in Material: Felt Colour: Dark grey Shape: Round Features 1. Foldable Design: Easy to fold and store, space saving, suitable for storing in small spaces or suitcases. 2. Large Capacity Storage: Round design provides ample storage space, can easily accommodate hats, clothes, toys and many other items. 3. Multi-functional Use: Not only suitable for hats, but also can store scarves, gloves, towels, baby items, etc., meet various storage needs. 4. Convenient to Carry: Equipped with a carrying handle design, easy to carry or hang, suitable for travelling, outdoor activities and other use scenarios. Precautions 1. Avoid heavy pressure to prevent deformation. 2. Keep it dry, avoid humid environment. 3. Clean it gently and avoid strong detergents. 4. Be careful when folding, avoid damaging the material. 5. Avoid contact with sharp objects to prevent scratches.
